title: [lichen_l2.c:528] lichen_l2_send missing init state check
description: Function: lichen_l2_send (static L2 callback). Precondition: The function checks iface_init_failed (line 539) and lichen_lora_l2_is_running() (line 544) but does not check lichen_lora_l2_needs_reinit(). If the module is in aborted state but L2 enable was not called (so running could still be true from a prior start), this path might proceed with a corrupted mutex. The iface_init_failed check covers initialization failures but not post-abort state. Compare with lichen_l2_enable (line 664) which checks needs_reinit. Priority 2 - could lead to deadlock after forced abort.
close_reason: Fixed: Moved link_ctx_initialized state check to the beginning of lichen_l2_send(), before taking the mutex or doing any packet processing. This ensures early rejection when the module is not initialized.
